description: Composition Yellow and grey printed kurta made of 100% cotton, has a rounded V-neck, yellow printed yoke with pin tucks and purple piping, concealed three hook placket with purple piping, mildly puffed cap sleeves with elasticated hems and a vented hem Fit Regular Wash care Wash separately in cold water using a mild detergent Wear art wherever you go! This kurta from aneri comes in a classic combination of grey and yellow, making it a perfect buy. The simple silhouette and cap sleeves give this kurta an ethnic look. Team it with leggings or pyjamas, heeled slippers and long earrings. Model statistics The product is a size S on a model of height 5'7" and chest 32"
